_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-008 (LS, cosine: 0.501), LS-K-005 (LS, cosine: 0.487).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.572). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [concepts, planning] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.937, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.088 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of organizational planning concepts." and "Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized C" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.509 < STS 0.572 (gap -0.062). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [concepts, planning] and [ai, appropriate, centralized] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, organizational]. DCWF-only: [concepts, planning]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data].
